description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open-plan design with a large, curved backdrop wall in a soft peach color, which frames a central black display screen. In front of the wall, there are multiple cylindrical stools arranged in a semi-circle, providing seating for visitors. Two round tables with matching peach chairs are positioned on either side, offering additional seating and surface space. Flanking the main area are two vertical banners with vibrant graphics, likely for branding or informational purposes. The entire setup rests on a light gray platform, creating a defined area for interaction. The overall aesthetic is sleek and inviting, suitable for exhibitions, trade shows, or urban pop-up events.
description: A modern kiosk with a curved peach backdrop, central display, cylindrical stools, side tables with chairs, and flanking banners on a gray platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved backdrop, central display, semi-circular arrangement of stools, side tables with chairs, and banners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the curved wall, the arrangement of stools, and the placement of tables and banners.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the solid peach curved wall and the backs of the banners, with minimal interior detail visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the curved wall, partial seating arrangement, and the side tables with chairs.
attribute_signage_type: Printed banners on both sides of the kiosk, vertical orientation, with visible branding graphics and text.
attribute_roof_design: Curved, vertical wall with no overhead roof; open-top design.
attribute_architectural_style: modern, minimalist with soft curves and open layout
